column.name: LVORM
column.description: Flag Material for Deletion at Storage Location Level

column.name: UMLME
column.description: Stock in transfer (from one storage location to another)

column.name: EINME
column.description: Total Stock of All Restricted Batches

column.name: VMLAB
column.description: Valuated unrestricted-use stock in previous period

column.name: VMUML
column.description: Stock in Transfer in Previous Period

column.name: VMINS
column.description: Stock in Quality Inspection in Previous Period

column.name: VMRET
column.description: Blocked Stock Returns in Previous Period

column.name: KZILL
column.description: Physical inventory indicator for whse stock in current year

column.name: KZILQ
column.description: Phys. inventory ind. f. stock in qual. insp. in current year

column.name: KZILE
column.description: Physical inventory indicator for restricted-use stock

column.name: KZILS
column.description: Physical inventory indicator for blocked stock

column.name: KZVLL
column.description: Physical inventory indicator for stock in previous year

column.name: KZVLQ
column.description: Phys. inventory ind. f. stock in qual. insp. in prev. period

column.name: KZVLE
column.description: Physical inventory ind. for restricted-use stock, prev.pd

column.name: KZVLS
column.description: Phys. inventory indicator for blocked stock in prev. period

column.name: LSOBS
column.description: Special procurement type at storage location level

column.name: LMINB
column.description: Reorder point for storage location MRP

column.name: LBSTF
column.description: Replenishment quantity for storage location MRP

column.name: HERKL
column.description: Country of Origin of Material (Non-Preferential Origin)

column.name: VKLAB
column.description: Stock value of a value-only material at sales price

column.name: VKUML
column.description: Sales value in stock transfer (SLOc to SLoc)

column.name: MDRUE
column.description: MARDH rec. already exists for per. before last of MARD per.

column.name: MDJIN
column.description: Fiscal year of current physical inventory indicator
